_authority: SQE DailyWork 路由關鍵詞正本。消費者: sqe-dailywork-user-prompt-submit.ps1 (promptReminders, 比對使用者輸入文字) 與 sqe-dailywork-post-tool-use.ps1 (pathReminders, 比對已變更內容/路徑)。改關鍵詞或訊息只改本檔; ui 組訊息的政策出處見 ../rules/visual_evidence_rules.md §1。regex 為 PowerShell -match 語法, 輸入已先 ToLowerInvariant。

promptReminders.message: UI or visual work detected: use native Windows Qt evidence through scripts\qt_visual_probe.py; do not treat offscreen screenshots or Playwright as PySide6 visual evidence.
Data contract work detected: read README.md, docs\risk-ledger.md, database\repository.py, and related tests before editing; preserve v2 storage paths unless explicitly changed.
Export/report work detected: verify the affected PDF, Excel, or PPTX path and preserve report contract parity.
Destructive or apply-style work detected: require explicit approval, avoid direct data/*.db changes, and report rollback/verification evidence.
MCP is deferred for SQE DailyWork phase 1; do not add MCP servers unless the user asks for a new plan.

pathReminders.message: UI surface changed: run focused tests, and use scripts\qt_visual_probe.py for visual/CJK/font evidence.
Data/service contract changed: run scripts\verify.ps1 when practical, or the closest focused unittest plus residual risk.
Harness or Claude automation changed: run scripts\harness_check.ps1 and inspect Claude hooks/agents/skills manually where possible.
